tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_affected
tools.description: Find test files affected by changed source files via dependency graph traversal.

files.description: List of changed file paths to analyze

filter.description: Custom glob pattern for test files (default: common test patterns)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_body
tools.description: Return the full source body of a symbol by name (function, struct, const, etc.). Collapses search + node lookup + file read into a single call. When the name is ambiguous, returns multiple matches ranked by relevance.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching bodies to return when the name is ambiguous (default: 3, max: 20)

symbol.description: Symbol name to look up (e.g. 'resolve_provider_api_key', 'CCH_SEED', 'GraphStats'). Qualified names are also accepted.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_branch_diff
tools.description: Compare the code graphs of two branches. Shows symbols added, removed, and changed (signature differs) between base and head.

base.description: Base branch name (e.g. 'main'). Defaults to the project's default branch.

file.description: Optional file path filter — only show diffs for symbols in this file

head.description: Head branch name (e.g. 'feature/foo'). Defaults to the current branch.

kind.description: Optional kind filter — only show diffs for this symbol kind (e.g. 'function', 'struct')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_branch_list
tools.description: List all tracked branches with their DB sizes, parent branch, and last sync time. Returns an empty list if multi-branch is not active.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_branch_search
tools.description: Search for symbols in another branch's code graph. Opens the target branch's DB and runs a search query against it.

branch.description: Branch name to search in (must be tracked via `tokensave branch add`)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

query.description: Search query string to match against symbol names

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_by_qualified_name
tools.description: Look up nodes by their qualified name. Multiple rows can share a qualified name (overloads, generics, separate impl blocks). Useful for cross-run lookups where the content-hash node ID has changed.

qualified_name.description: The exact qualified name to look up.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_callees
tools.description: Find all callees of a given node (function, method, etc.) up to a specified depth. When a callee resolves to a trait method, the concrete impl methods reachable through that trait are also returned, tagged with `dispatch_via_trait: true` and a `dispatch_from` pointing at the trait method. Pass `resolve_dispatch: false` to disable this behaviour and get only direct call edges.

node_id.description: The unique node ID to find callees for

resolve_dispatch.description: If true (default), append concrete impl methods for any trait-method callee.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_callers
tools.description: Find all callers of a given node (function, method, etc.) up to a specified depth.

node_id.description: The unique node ID to find callers for

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_callers_for
tools.description: Returns the caller set of every supplied node ID in one round-trip. Useful for clustering or similarity queries that need many caller sets at once. Returns a map of {node_id: [caller_id, ...]}. Defaults to `calls` edges; pass `kind` to filter by `uses`, `type_of`, etc.

kind.description: Edge kind to filter by (default: "calls"). Pass an empty string to match all kinds.

node_ids.description: Node IDs to look up callers for.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_changelog
tools.description: Generate a semantic diff/changelog between two git refs, categorizing symbols as added, removed, or modified.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_circular
tools.description: Detect circular dependencies between files in the code graph.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_commit_context
tools.description: Semantic summary of uncommitted changes for drafting a commit message. Returns changed symbols, file roles, and recent commit style.

staged_only.description: If true, only analyze staged changes (default: false = all uncommitted changes)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_complexity
tools.description: Rank functions/methods by composite complexity score (lines + fan-out + fan-in).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

node_kind.description: Filter by node kind (default: function and method)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_config
tools.description:
Query TOML or JSON config files by dotted key path. Use 'path' for a single file (e.g. Cargo.toml, tsconfig.json, pyproject.toml) or 'glob' to query the same key across multiple files. The 'key' is dot-separated (e.g. 'package.version', 'dependencies.tokio'). Returns each match's file, parsed value, and the line where the key is defined. Format is detected from extension: .toml → TOML, .json → JSON. 

Does not query the code graph — pure filesystem + parser. Works on uninitialized projects.

glob.description: Glob pattern to match multiple config files (e.g. '**/Cargo.toml', 'crates/*/Cargo.toml'). Mutually exclusive with 'path'.

path.description: Project-relative path to a single config file (e.g. 'Cargo.toml'). Mutually exclusive with 'glob'.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_constructors
tools.description: Find every place a given struct is instantiated as a literal ({ field: value, ... }). Each result includes the file, line, the field list present in that literal, and the set of fields missing relative to the struct's current definition (from the graph). The missing-fields list is the typical refactor signal: after adding a required field, this tool surfaces every site that needs updating, before cargo even compiles. Currently best-effort for Rust source; pattern matching ignores `match` arms and `if let` patterns.

limit.description: Maximum number of literal sites to return (default: 100, max: 1000).

struct.description: Struct name to search literal sites of (e.g. 'GraphStats', 'Config').

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_context
tools.description:
Build an AI-ready context for a task description. Returns relevant symbols, relationships, and optionally code snippets.

CALL BUDGET: 3 calls maximum for this project (4610 nodes). Stop after 3 calls. If the question is not fully answered, synthesise from what you have — do not exceed the budget.

exclude_node_ids.description: Node IDs to exclude from results (pass seen_node_ids from previous call for session deduplication)

include_code.description: If true, include source code snippets for key symbols (default: false)

keywords.description: Extra search keywords for synonym expansion. Use this when the task uses conceptual terms that may not match symbol names — e.g. for 'authentication', pass ["login", "session", "credential", "token", "auth"]. The graph is searched for each keyword independently.

max_code_blocks.description: Maximum number of code snippets when include_code is true (default: 5)

max_nodes.description: Maximum number of symbols to include (default: 20)

max_per_file.description: Maximum symbols from a single file in results. Prevents one large file from dominating (default: max_nodes/3, minimum 3)

merge_adjacent.description: When true, merge code blocks from the same file whose line ranges are adjacent or overlapping (default: false)

mode.description: Context mode: 'explore' (default) for general exploration, 'plan' for implementation planning (adds extension points, dependency order, test coverage)

task.description: Natural language description of the task or question

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_coupling
tools.description: Rank files by coupling: fan_in (most depended on) or fan_out (most dependencies).

direction.description: fan_in: files depended on by the most others. fan_out: files that depend on the most others (default: fan_in)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_dead_code
tools.description: Find symbols with no incoming edges (potentially unreachable code). Always excludes `main` and `test*` functions. By default also excludes `pub` items (they may be referenced outside the indexed scope) — pass `include_public: true` to audit pub items with zero indexed callers, which is what you want for workspace-internal cleanup.

include_public.description: When true, do NOT exclude pub items. Default false.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_dependency_depth
tools.description: Show the longest file-level dependency chains. Files at the end of long chains are fragile to upstream changes.

limit.description: Maximum number of chains to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_derives
tools.description: List `#[derive(...)]` macros attached to a type and the trait + method names each one synthesizes. Prevents dead-end searches for autogenerated symbols (e.g. `.clone()` from `#[derive(Clone)]`). Well-known derives (`Debug`, `Clone`, `Copy`, `Default`, `PartialEq`, `Eq`, `PartialOrd`, `Ord`, `Hash`, `Serialize`, `Deserialize`, `Display`, `Error`) carry full trait + method info; unknown / proc-macro derives surface with `well_known: false` so callers can still see the derive name.

node_id.description: Optional: look up the type by node ID instead.

qualified_name.description: The type's qualified name (or short name — same lookup as tokensave_by_qualified_name).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_diagnose
tools.description: Parse raw `cargo check` / `cargo clippy` stderr text and map each diagnostic to the smallest containing graph node, with callers pre-attached so you can see what the failing code is reachable from. Diagnostics without a `--> file:line:col` span are dropped. Pass the full stderr capture; you do not need to pre-filter.

cargo_output.description: Raw stderr text from `cargo check` / `cargo clippy` / `rustc`.

include_callers.description: Attach up to 5 callers per diagnostic (default: true).

max_diagnostics.description: Cap on diagnostics in the response (default: 50).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_diagnostics
tools.description:
Run the project's type-checker (cargo check for Rust, tsc for TypeScript, pyright for Python) and return structured errors and warnings. Each diagnostic includes file, line range, level, code, message, driver, and the enclosing graph node when one can be resolved. Replaces the recurring 'run cargo → parse text → read file' loop with a single structured response. 

Note: the cargo target dir is forced to .tokensave/target/ so we don't race with the user's interactive cargo runs. The first call against a fresh tree builds dependencies from scratch, which can take several minutes on large workspaces; subsequent calls are sub-second. Build scripts and proc macros from the project execute as part of cargo check — same trust model as running it manually.

path.description: Project-relative file path when scope='file'.

scope.description: Run scope. Default 'workspace'. 'package' requires `name`; 'file' requires `path` and currently runs workspace + post-filter (cargo has no native single-file mode).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_diff_context
tools.description: Given changed file paths, return semantic context: which symbols were modified, what depends on them, and affected tests.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_distribution
tools.description: Show node kind distribution (classes, methods, fields, etc.) per file or directory.

path.description: Directory or file path prefix to filter (e.g. 'src/main/java/com/example'). Omit for entire codebase.

summary.description: If true, aggregate counts across all matching files instead of per-file breakdown (default: false)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_doc_coverage
tools.description: Find public symbols missing documentation (docstrings).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

path.description: Directory or file path prefix to filter (e.g. 'src/main'). Omit for entire codebase.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_dsm
tools.description: Get the Design Structure Matrix: file dependency summary showing clusters, density, and layering violations.

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_field_sites
tools.description: Find every read and write site of a named field across the codebase. Returns two arrays: write_sites (assignments to the field) and read_sites (everything else). Each entry includes file, line, enclosing symbol, and a source snippet. Useful when renaming, removing, or adding an invariant to a field — the write-site list is the exact blast radius. Pattern matches `.<field>` references; field-by-name is shorthand for any struct's same-named field, while `Struct::field` form narrows to a specific declaration.

field.description: Field name. Bare name ('last_sync_at') matches across structs; qualified form ('GraphStats::last_sync_at') narrows to one struct's field.

limit.description: Maximum sites per kind (default: 200, max: 2000).

writes_only.description: When true, returns only write_sites and omits reads. Default false.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_files
tools.description: List indexed project files. Use to explore file structure without reading file contents.

format.description: Output format: flat (one per line) or grouped by directory (default: grouped)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path

pattern.description: Filter files matching this glob pattern (e.g. '**/*.rs')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_gini
tools.description: Compute inequality (Gini coefficient) for any metric across files or symbols. Detects god files and uneven complexity distribution.

limit.description: Number of top outliers to return (default: 10)

metric.description: Metric to measure inequality for (default: complexity)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path

scope.description: Aggregate per file or per symbol (default: file)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_god_class
tools.description: Find classes with the most members (methods + fields).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_health
tools.description: Get quality signal (0-10000) with root cause breakdown (acyclicity, depth, equality, redundancy, modularity). Quality signal = geometric mean of 5 dimensions — maximize this ONE number.

details.description: If true, include full dimension breakdown (default: false)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_hotspots
tools.description: Find symbols with the highest connectivity (most incoming + outgoing edges).

limit.description: Maximum number of hotspots to return (default: 10)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_impact
tools.description: Compute the impact radius of a node: all symbols that directly or indirectly depend on it.

node_id.description: The unique node ID to compute impact for

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_implementations
tools.description: Find every type implementing a given trait, or every body of a given method name. The 'trait' form returns each implementing type plus the methods on its impl block. The 'method' form returns every function/ method named X across the project, grouped by enclosing type when present. Each result includes file, signature, and the method body.

limit.description: Maximum number of implementations to return (default: 20, max: 200)

method.description: Method or function name to find every implementation of (e.g. 'extensions', 'count_complexity'). Mutually exclusive with 'trait'.

trait.description: Trait name to look up implementations of (e.g. 'LanguageExtractor', 'Display'). Mutually exclusive with 'method'.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_impls
tools.description: List `impl` blocks matching a trait, a type, or both. With no filter returns every impl in the graph (use sparingly). Both arguments accept short names (e.g. `Display`) or qualified names. Surfaces information that is otherwise hard to query: trait-method dispatch targets, which types satisfy a given trait, and which traits a type implements.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100).

trait.description: Trait name to filter by (short or qualified). Omit to include all traits.

type.description: Implementing type to filter by (short or qualified). Omit to include all types.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_inheritance_depth
tools.description: Find the deepest class/interface inheritance hierarchies by walking extends chains.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_insert_at
tools.description: Insert content before or after a unique anchor in a file. The anchor can be a unique string or a 1-indexed line number. Fails if the anchor matches more than one line.

anchor.description: Unique string or line number (1-indexed) to insert at

before.description: If true, insert before the anchor line; if false, insert after (default: false)

path.description: Absolute or project-relative file path

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_largest
tools.description: Rank nodes by size (line count). Find the largest classes, longest methods, biggest enums, etc.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_module_api
tools.description: Show the public API surface of a file or directory: all pub symbols sorted by file and line.

path.description: File path or directory prefix to inspect

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_multi_str_replace
tools.description: Apply multiple string replacements atomically in a single file. All replacements must match exactly once. If any replacement fails (0 or >1 matches), the entire operation is aborted and no changes are made.

path.description: Absolute or project-relative file path

replacements.description: Array of [old_str, new_str] pairs to replace

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_node
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a single node by its ID.

node_id.description: The unique node ID to retrieve

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_outline
tools.description: Flat list of every top-level symbol defined in a file (functions, structs, enums, traits, classes, impls, etc.) — like a table of contents. Sorted by line number; no code bodies. Optional 'kinds' filter narrows to specific node kinds. Use this as the cheapest way to orient before zooming into a large file with tokensave_node, tokensave_body, or tokensave_read.

kinds.description: Optional filter on node kinds. Common values: 'function', 'struct', 'enum', 'trait', 'impl', 'class', 'method', 'const'. Case-insensitive. Default: all kinds.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_port_order
tools.description: Topological sort of symbols in a directory -- port leaves first, dependents after.

limit.description: Maximum number of symbols to return (default: 50)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_port_status
tools.description: Compare symbols between source and target directories to track porting progress.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_pr_context
tools.description: Semantic summary of changes between two git refs for drafting a pull request description.

base_ref.description: Base branch or ref to compare against (default: 'main')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_rank
tools.description: Rank nodes by edge count for a given relationship type (calls, implements, extends, etc.).

direction.description: Edge direction: 'incoming' ranks targets (default, e.g. most-implemented interface), 'outgoing' ranks sources (e.g. class that implements the most interfaces)

edge_kind.description: The relationship type to rank by (e.g. 'implements' to find most-implemented interfaces)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_read
tools.description: Read a file or its symbol map. Modes: 'full' (entire file), 'lines' (1-based inclusive byte-range slice via the 'lines' arg, e.g. '120-180'), 'map' (flat list of every top-level symbol from the graph — no source bytes touched), 'signatures' (functions and types with their cached signature). Cross-session cached: a re-call on an unchanged file returns a tiny stub with 'unchanged: true'.

file.description: Project-relative or absolute path to the file (e.g. 'src/sync.rs').

lines.description: Required when mode='lines'. Format 'A-B' or single 'A' (1-based, inclusive). E.g. '120-180' or '42'.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_record_code_area
tools.description: Record that the agent has been working in a code area (a file or directory). The first call sets an optional description; subsequent calls bump the touch counter and update last_touched_at. Recall with tokensave_session_recall.

description.description: Optional short description of what this area is or what was changed.

path.description: File or directory path (project-relative).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_record_decision
tools.description: Persist a design or architecture decision so it can be recalled in a future session via tokensave_session_recall. Use for choices the agent or user would otherwise have to re-explain (e.g. "use JWT for auth — session tokens flagged by legal"). Stored in the per-project DB.

files.description: File paths that the decision applies to.

reason.description: Optional reason / context (e.g. "session tokens flagged by legal").

text.description: The decision itself, in one sentence (e.g. "use JWT for auth").

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_recursion
tools.description: Detect recursive and mutually-recursive call cycles in the call graph.

limit.description: Maximum number of cycles to return (default: 10)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (e.g. 'src/main/java')

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_rename_preview
tools.description: Show all references to a symbol -- all edges where the node appears as source or target.

node_id.description: The unique node ID to find references for

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_run_affected_tests
tools.description: Run `cargo test` for tests that cover the symbols in `changed_paths` (or, if omitted, the files changed in the working tree). Closes the loop opened by `tokensave_test_map` / `tokensave_test_risk` — emits pass/fail per test alongside the source nodes each test covers. Output is the libtest summary parsed into JSON.

changed_paths.description: Explicit file paths to compute affected tests from. Defaults to `git diff --name-only` against the working tree.

max_tests.description: Cap on tests dispatched in a single invocation (default: 100).

timeout_secs.description: Maximum wall time before the cargo subprocess is killed (default: 300).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_search
tools.description: Search for symbols (functions, structs, traits, etc.) in the code graph by name or keyword.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

query.description: Search query string to match against symbol names

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_session_end
tools.description: Re-scan and compare current health against session baseline (saved by session_start). Returns diff showing what improved or degraded.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_session_recall
tools.description: Recall persisted decisions (and optionally code areas) from past sessions. When `query` is provided, runs FTS5 search across decision text and reason. When omitted, returns the most recent decisions newest-first. Pair with tokensave_record_decision.

include_code_areas.description: If true, also return the top-touched code areas (default: false).

limit.description: Maximum decisions to return (default: 20, max: 200).

query.description: FTS5 query string (e.g. "auth OR session"). Omit for newest-first listing.

since.description: Unix timestamp; only return decisions made at-or-after this time.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_session_start
tools.description: Save current health metrics as baseline for later comparison via session_end. Call this before starting work.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_signature
tools.description: Return the signature-level metadata for symbols matching a qualified name — visibility, signature string (generics, params, return type, where clauses), docstring, async flag, and kind. No bodies. Use this instead of reading source files when you only need the public-API surface of a function, method, or type. Multiple rows can be returned (overloads, separate impls).

node_id.description: Optional: look up a single node by its ID instead of qualified_name.

qualified_name.description: The exact qualified name to look up.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_signature_search
tools.description: Find functions and methods by signature shape: return type, parameter substring, async, or path. Searches the cached `signature` column on every Function/Method node. Substring-matched with case-sensitive compare; combine multiple criteria for narrower hits. Use tokensave_search for plain name lookups; this tool is for refactor questions like 'find every function returning Result<_, MyError>' or 'every async fn taking &mut self'.

async.description: When true, only return functions marked async. When false, exclude them. Omit to ignore async-ness.

limit.description: Maximum matches to return (default: 50, max: 500).

params.description: Substrings that must all appear in the parameter list portion of the signature. E.g. ['&mut self'], ['i32', 'String'].

path.description: Filter to symbols defined under this directory.

returns.description: Substring that must appear in the return-type portion of the signature (after '->'). E.g. 'Result<', 'impl Future', 'Vec<u32>'.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_similar
tools.description: Find symbols with similar names using full-text search and substring matching.

limit.description: Maximum number of results (default: 10)

symbol.description: Symbol name to find similar matches for

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_simplify_scan
tools.description: Quality analysis of changed files: duplications, dead code, coupling, and complexity hotspots.

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_status
tools.description: Return aggregate statistics about the code graph (node/edge/file counts, DB size, etc.).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_str_replace
tools.description: Replace a unique string in a file with new content. Fails if the old string is not found or matches more than once. This is the safest edit primitive — use this instead of sed/awk.

old_str.description: Exact string to find and replace. Must match exactly once in the file.

path.description: Absolute or project-relative file path

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_test_map
tools.description: Map source symbols to their test functions. Shows which tests cover which source code.

file.description: Source file path to find test coverage for

node_id.description: Specific node ID to find test coverage for (alternative to file)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_test_risk
tools.description: Find high-risk source symbols with weak or no test coverage. Risk = (complexity + 1) × (fan_in + 1) × untested_multiplier. Answers: where should the next test go?

include_tested.description: Include already-tested functions in results (default: false)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_todos
tools.description: Find TODO, FIXME, XXX, HACK, WIP, NOTE, and unimplemented markers across the project. Each result includes the marker kind, file, line, the comment text, and the enclosing symbol name (function/method) for quick orientation.

kinds.description: Marker kinds to include (default: TODO, FIXME, XXX, HACK, WIP, NOTE, UNIMPLEMENTED). Matched case-insensitively.

limit.description: Maximum number of markers to return (default: 200, max: 2000)

path.description: Filter to files under this directory path (relative to project root)

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_type_hierarchy
tools.description: Show the full type hierarchy for a trait/interface/class: all implementors and extenders, recursively.

node_id.description: The type node ID to build the hierarchy for

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_unsafe_patterns
tools.description: Find unwrap(), expect(), panic!(), todo!(), unimplemented!(), and unsafe { } sites across the project. Each match includes the file, line, kind, enclosing symbol, the source line, and an in_test flag derived from the path. Use this in security/quality reviews to surface panic sites before a release. Defaults to all kinds; pass `kinds` to narrow.

exclude_tests.description: When true, skips files whose path looks like a test (default: false).

kinds.description: Subset of patterns to search. Default: ['unwrap', 'expect', 'panic', 'todo', 'unimplemented', 'unsafe_block'].

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default: 200, max: 2000).

path.description: Filter to files under this directory (relative to project root).

tools.name: mcp__tokensave__tokensave_unused_imports
tools.description: Find import/use nodes that are never referenced by any other node.
